description: Social-network (Facebook-like) legacy aggregate targets: PUBLISHED AGGREGATE statistics only (no individual-level data). NOTE: the Facebook friend-degree distribution is NOT a clean power-law (Ugander et al. 2011), so degree_tail_exponent is deliberately OMITTED rather than fabricated.

clustering.source: High average clustering ~0.6 for the Facebook friendship graph (Ugander, Karrer, Backstrom & Marlow 2011, 'The Anatomy of the Facebook Social Graph')

diurnal_peak_hour.source: Social-network engagement peaks in the evening ~19-21h local time (circadian engagement studies)

diurnal_trough_hour.source: Overnight trough ~03-05h local time (circadian engagement studies)

posts_per_agent_day.source: Heavy-tailed; most users post < 1x/day (platform usage aggregates)

appeal_grant_rate.source: Content reinstatement on appeal varies ~10-30% (Meta transparency reports / Oversight Board)
